brief.rationale: Copy is sterile / compliance-toned — fails brand_voice_similarity only. We keep a single em-dash aside so the voice-signals eval still has a heuristic match, and we keep all CTAs / lengths / facts valid.

email.subject_b: Catalog update reference for your current account
email.body: Dear {{first_name}}. This is a service notification. A new dish from Maya Patel — reference number A-218 — is available for selection. The item is included under your current subscription tier. Please review the catalog and indicate a preference at your earliest convenience. Additional preference details are available through the link below. [Review catalog]({{short_url}})

sms.body: Notification: a new catalog item is available — reference A-218. Review at {{short_url}}.

push.title: Subscription update is available
push.body: Tap to review the updated catalog entry.
